headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Buy on Old Dominion Freight Line, Raises Price Target to $235
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Jordan Alliger   maintains Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $209 to $235.
